summary: Implemented US-012: Added abandonment details system with deterministic generation of 2-5 era-appropriate details per site. Created abandonment-fragments.ts dataset with 36 fragments across 8 detail types (outdated-copyright, stale-news-date, broken-badge, dead-counter, deprecated-browser-notice, missing-asset-placeholder, expired-ssl-notice, defunct-partner-logo), each filtered by compatible era. Created abandonment-generator.ts using deriveSeed('abandonment') for RNG isolation, with template placeholder resolution for {count}, {staleYear}, and {staleDate}. Integrated into GeneratedSite interface and generation pipeline. Added render-abandonment-details.ts for DOM rendering with type-specific markup. Added CSS classes (.abandonment-badge, .abandonment-counter, .abandonment-browser-notice, .abandonment-missing-asset, .abandonment-partner-logos) using CSS custom properties. All 519 tests pass including 70 US-012 tests covering structure, count bounds, determinism, era appropriateness, template resolution, DOM independence, RNG isolation, integration, no network failures, content readability, cross-seed uniqueness, smoke tests, snapshots, and CSS verification.
